title: draba californica
intro: Draba californica, also known as the California draba, is a flowering plant species that belongs to the mustard family (Brassicaceae). It is a perennial herb native to the western United States and is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems, due to its expectorant and antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of Draba californica can be made by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water to create a tea, or by using the plant's roots and leaves to make a salve or tincture.
